hibernate-mapping.sql-query: INSERT INTO cabinet.dbo.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV(FreeFormFACILITY) (select distinct(RTRIM(Value)) from cabinet.dbo.ROI_SearchLOV where Item = 'freeform.facility')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(Value)) FROM cabinet.dbo.ROI_SearchLOV WHERE Item='freeform.facility' AND Value NOT IN (SELECT FreeFormFACILITY FROM cabinet.dbo.ROI_FreeFormFacilityLOV)
